The manipulation leads to information disclosure. This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2025-49515. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. There is no exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-49514 | Moodle DNS dns rebinding
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Moodle and classified as problematic. This issue affects some unknown processing of the component DNS Handler. The manipulation leads to reliance on reverse dns resolution. The identification of this vulnerability is CVE-2025-49514. The attack may be initiated remotely. There is no exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-49513 | Moodle Login Page credentials storage
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability has been found in Moodle and classified as problematic. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the component Login Page. The manipulation leads to unprotected storage of credentials. This vulnerability was named CVE-2025-49513. The attack can be initiated remotely. There is no exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-49512 | Moodle 5.0 MathJax cross site scripting
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, was found in Moodle 5.0. This affects an unknown part of the component MathJax. The manipulation leads to cross site scripting. This vulnerability is uniquely identified as CVE-2025-49512. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. There is no exploit available. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

items.title: CVE-2025-5396 | Bearsthemes Bears Backup Plugin up to 2.0.0 on WordPress call_user_func code injection
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, has been found in Bearsthemes Bears Backup Plugin up to 2.0.0 on WordPress. Affected by this issue is the function call_user_func. The manipulation leads to code injection. This vulnerability is handled as CVE-2025-5396. The attack may be launched remotely. There is no exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2025-7735 | UNIMAX Hospital Information System up to 2024.1.2.1 sql injection (EUVD-2025-21757)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability classified as critical was found in UNIMAX Hospital Information System up to 2024.1.2.1. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality. The manipulation leads to sql injection. This vulnerability is known as CVE-2025-7735. The attack can be launched remotely. There is no exploit available.
